meta.title: Shah Fahad · Fullstack Engineer
meta.description: Fullstack engineer in Frankfurt with five years building React and Node applications in production, now pursuing an M.Sc. in Web and Data Science.

hero.lead: Five years building React and Node applications in production, most recently as a Senior Software Engineer on a 17 person team. I’m now doing an M.Sc. in Web and Data Science at the University of Koblenz, moving toward work that sits between the two.
